what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links an image asset to a design-source channel entry.
observations: YAML frontmatter with no body content
Fields: id, channel, attachment_type, target, added
conventions: id prefix att- with short hash
Target uses a custom image:// URI scheme
concerns: Target path lacks file extension or MIME info
No title, alt text, or uploader metadata
notes: A minimal, timestamped image attachment pointer for a design-source pitch.
questions: What is pitch p-18 and where is its canonical record?
Who added this attachment and why?
Does the referenced image asset still exist?
purpose_vs_actual: The file acts as an attachment metadata record, which matches its apparent purpose.
intention_signals: It appears intended to attach a visual pitch image to a design-source channel so it can be retrieved alongside related design context.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, schema-bound pointer from a channel attachment to an image asset, supporting retrieval of visual design pitch material in a fused system.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment metadata file that points the design-source channel to image asset image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-18 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that an image belongs to a recent design-source pitch for later lookup and context.
